features: Get salon-quality nails at home with our Stick on Nails Kit! With 24pcs of Coffin Ballerina fake nails, in 12 different sizes, and tools included, create beautiful French nail art for special occasions or every day
Made of premium ABS material, our false nails are eco-friendly, non-toxic, odorless, fadeless, and nondeforming, giving you a safe and efficient nail art experience. Reusable stickers are included

Applying long Coffin-shaped fake nails with glue has never been easier! In just a few minutes, you'll have your favorite manicure without waiting at the salon. Simple steps allow you to better control the size and shape of the nail plate, so it fits your nails perfectly

Remove the nails in a breeze with our kit! Pry the nail edges with a manicure stick, soak enough false nail remover into the seam, wait for a few minutes until soft, and finally take down the false nails

Give the gift of beautiful nails to your girlfriend, sister, wife, family, or friends! Our acrylic nail tips are perfect for special occasions like parties, birthdays, weddings, dating, or holidays like Valentine's Day and Christmas. Grab a set now
description: Product description Preparing Your Nails: 1. Clean nails of any polish or oil. 2. Select the correct size nails. How to use it: 1. File nail surface and clean your nails. 2. Select a suitable size false nail 3. Select the correct size of jelly adhesive for each finger. Or Apply nail glue on the false nail with brush. 4. Place the nail at 45 degree angle and gently press down for up to 10-30 seconds. 5. File and shape your new nails if needed. How to Remove (Adhesive Jelly Glue): 1.Use the stick to raise a small mouth at the edge and soak it in warm water for one minute to soften the jelly glue. 2.After soaking, use the inclined surface of the stick to lift the nail piece from the edge and slowly extend inward to remove pectin. 3.Soak the nails in warm water again, use the pointed end of the stick to remove the excess pectin on the nail surface in a rotating way. 4.Remove excess pectin from the nail plate, and keep the nail plate for repeated wearing. TIPS: Jelly Adhesive stickers make fake nails reusable, but glue can’t. We recommend that you use the jelly glue a few times Directions Preparing Your Nails: 1. Clean nails of any polish or oil. 2. Select the correct size nails. How to use it: 1. File nail surface and clean your nails. 2. Select a suitable size false nail 3. Select the correct size of jelly adhesive for each finger. Or Apply nail glue on the false nail with brush. 4. Place the nail at 45 degree angle and gently press down for up to 10-30 seconds. 5. File and shape your new nails if needed. How to Remove (Adhesive Jelly Glue): 1.Use the stick to raise a small mouth at the edge and soak it in warm water for one minute to soften the jelly glue. 2.After soaking, use the inclined surface of the stick to lift the nail piece from the edge and slowly extend inward to remove pectin. 3.Soak the nails in warm water again, use the pointed end of the stick to remove the excess pectin on the nail surface in a rotating way. 4.Remove excess pectin from the nail plate, and keep the nail plate for repeated wearing. TIPS: Jelly Adhesive stickers make fake nails reusable, but glue can’t. We recommend that you use the jelly glue a few times
